title: Piquant French Tofu Galette
description: A low-fat, French-inspired dish featuring tofu, presented in a galette form and steamed in a bamboo steamer, with a balance of bitter and molten flavors.
instructions: Preheat the steamer by filling the bottom with water and bringing it to a boil.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and sauté the sliced onion until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
In a large bowl, combine the crumbled tofu, cooked onion and garlic, chopped thyme, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Stir in the diced bitter melon and shredded vegan cheese.
Transfer the mixture to a galette pan or a heat-proof plate that fits in the steamer.
Place the galette in the steamer, cover it with a lid, and steam for 20 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the tofu is heated through.
Remove the galette from the steamer and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
